HowToPlay.title: How To Play
HowToPlay.goal: Your goal is to discover the hidden 5-letter word within 6 attempts.
HowToPlay.rule1: - Each guess you make must be a valid 5-letter word.
HowToPlay.rule2: - Tile colors show how close your guess is to the answer.
HowToPlay.correctExplanation: <letter>S</letter> is in the word and in the correct spot.
HowToPlay.presentExplanation: <letter>L</letter> is in the word but in the wrong spot.
HowToPlay.absentExplanation: <letter>A</letter> is not in the word in any spot.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy – {appName}
PrivacyPolicy.intro: At {appName}, your privacy matters. This page explains how we handle your information when you play our game.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.anonymous: <underline>Anonymous Players:</underline> No personal data is collected.
section1.loggedIn: <underline>Logged-in Users:</underline> Only game statistics are collected. Authentication is via Firebase (Google, Facebook, or Microsoft), and passwords are never stored.

section2.title: 2. How We Store Data
section2.gameSettings: <underline>Game Settings:</underline> Saved locally on your device using local storage.
section2.userStats: <underline>User Stats:</underline> If you’re logged in, your game statistics are saved securely in the cloud via Google Firebase.
section2.analytics: <underline>Analytics:</underline> We use Google Analytics to understand game usage and improve your experience. No personal data is shared.

section4.title: 4. Playing the Game
section4.anonPlay: - You can play anonymously without creating an account.
section4.createAccount: - Creating an account lets you save stats across devices.

section5.title: 5. Safety & Security
section5.noShare: - We do not sell or share your personal information.
section5.secureData: - Your data is stored securely and used only to enhance your gameplay experience.

section6.title: 6. Children
section6.content: {appName} can be played by any age. No personal data collection from children is required unless they log in with an account.

section7.title: 7. Changes to This Policy
section7.content: We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted here.

section8.title: 8. User data deletion
section8.content: If you would like us to delete your account and any personal data we hold about you, please contact us at: <email></email>. We will respond and take steps to remove your account and associated data upon request.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your data, feel free to contact us at: <email></email>

Login.intro: Track your progress, earn badges, and celebrate your Wordle wins.
Login.cta: Log in or create a free account

pwaInstall.description: Install the game on your device to play offline and access it instantly.
pwaInstall.iosInstructions: To install this app on your iOS device, tap the share button <shareBtn></shareBtn> and then "<addToHomeScreen>Add to Home Screen</addToHomeScreen>"
pwaInstall.androidInstructions: To install, open the browser menu and tap the option "<addToHomeScreen>Add to Home Screen</addToHomeScreen>". or click the install icon in the address bar.
